title: impatiens burtonii var. wittei
intro: Impatiens burtonii var. wittei, also known as the African impatiens, is a species of flowering plant in the balsam family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of the plant include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat skin conditions such as eczema and wounds. In herbal preparations, the leaves and roots of the plant are typically used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
